Name: Visual must fit within page bounds
Description: Every visual container must be fully within the page dimensions. A visual that extends beyond the page width or height will be clipped or invisible in Fabric.

Name: Visuals must not overlap each other
Description: Two or more visual containers on the same page must not share any area. Overlapping visuals make the report hard to read and interact with.

Name: Visual must have at least one field assigned
Description: Every visual should have at least one field or measure in its projections. An empty visual adds no value and may cause rendering errors.

Name: Page must have a display name
Description: Every report page (section) must have a non-empty displayName. An unnamed page makes navigation confusing for report consumers.

Name: Avoid too many visuals on a single page
Description: A report page should not contain more than 6 visuals. Too many visuals on one page reduce readability and may slow down rendering.

Name: Avoid too many report pages
Description: A report should not contain more than 7 pages. Too many tabs make navigation harder and reduce usability.

Name: Visual must have alt text for accessibility
Description: Every visual should have an alt text description set in the formatting options (General > Alt text). This is required for screen reader accessibility.

Name: Text size must be at least 12px
Description: Any explicitly configured text size in a visual's formatting options must be at least 12px to ensure readability. Applies only to properties that are explicitly set (theme defaults are not checked).
